  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
  2. Model

Uses of Interface
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.Model

Packages that use Model
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Primary framework abstractions for algorithms, models, populations and optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.metrics
Core metric collectors and latent-knowledge analyzers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.plugins
Plugin metadata and dependency contracts.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.experiments.factory
Factories that assemble runtime components from config/plugins.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Probabilistic models for continuous search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete
Probabilistic models for discrete/binary search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation
Probabilistic models for permutation spaces.

    LatentKnowledgeAnalyzer.analyze(Population<G> population, List<Individual<G>> elite, Model<G> model, LatentTelemetry previous, Map<String,Object> params)

  • Uses of Model in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous that implement Model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    CmaEsStrategyModel
    CMA-ES strategy model with evolution paths, rank-1/rank-mu covariance updates, cumulative step-size adaptation, and IPOP-like internal restarts.
    final class 
    CopulaBaselineModel
    Gaussian copula baseline with empirical marginals.
    final class 
    DiagonalGaussianModel
    Diagonal Gaussian model for continuous EDAs (Σ = diag(σ^2)).
    final class 
    FullGaussianModel
    Full-covariance Gaussian model (N(μ, Σ)) with Cholesky sampling.
    final class 
    GmmModel
    Diagonal-covariance Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with EM fitting.
    final class 
    KdeModel
    Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) model with Gaussian kernels.
    final class 
    NormalizingFlowModel
    Lightweight flow-based density model for continuous EDAs.
    final class 
    SNesModel
    Separable Natural Evolution Strategies (sNES) model.
    final class 
    XNesModel
    Exponential NES (xNES) full-covariance model.

  • Uses of Model in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete that implement Model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BernoulliUmdaModel
    Univariate Marginal Distribution Algorithm (UMDA) model for bitstrings.
    final class 
    BmdaModel
    Bivariate Marginal Distribution Algorithm (BMDA) model.
    final class 
    BoaEbnaModel
    Sparse Bayesian-network model used by BOA/EBNA-style discrete EDAs.
    final class 
    CompactGaModel
    Compact Genetic Algorithm (cGA)-style probability-vector model.
    final class 
    HierarchicalBoaModel
    Hierarchical BOA-style sparse Bayesian-network model for bitstrings.
    final class 
    MimicChowLiuModel
    MIMIC-style model using a Chow-Liu maximum-weight dependency tree.
    final class 
    PbilFrequencyModel
    Population-Based Incremental Learning (PBIL) probability-vector model.

  • Uses of Model in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token that implement Model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    TokenCategoricalModel
    Categorical token model for variable-length integer vectors.

  • Uses of Model in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation that implement Model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EdgeHistogramModel
    Edge Histogram Model (EHM) for permutation EDAs.
    final class 
    MallowsModel
    Mallows model under Kendall distance.
    final class 
    PlackettLuceModel
    Plackett-Luce model for permutations.
